title: Smoky Flaky Australian Chicken Skewers
description: Salty, smoky skewers of tender chicken marinated in a fragrant spice paste, cooked to flaky perfection on a binchotan grill for a quick, FODMAP‑friendly weeknight meal.
instructions: In a bowl combine olive oil, smoked paprika, ground cumin, dried rosemary, sea salt, black pepper, and chicken stock concentrate to form a paste.
Slice the chicken thighs into 2‑cm thick pieces and toss them in the spice paste until evenly coated.
Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 30 minutes to let the flavors infuse.
Preheat a binchotan grill to high heat until it reaches a smoking temperature of about 250 °C.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, spacing them evenly for airflow.
Brush the skewers lightly with a little olive oil before placing them on the grill.
Grill the skewers for 6–7 minutes on each side, or until the internal temperature reaches 75 °C and the outside looks smoky‑flaky.
Serve immediately with lemon wedges on the side for squeezing over the chicken.
